title: Through Item Frame
description: A lightweight client-side mod that allows you to open containers behind item frames with a simple right-click.
body:
## Through Item Frame(无视物品展示框)


![Logo](https://github.com/Anchenqua/Through-Item-Frame/blob/1.21.8-fabric/src/main/resources/assets/through-item-frame/icon.png?raw=true)


## English
This is a simple mod    
It only has one function    
Prevent your Item Frame from blocking you when opening containers behind it    
Of course, it also supports Glow Item Frame（Supports almost everything）.    
[GitHub repository](https://github.com/Anchenqua/Through-Item-Frame)           
Tips:It doesn't require the server to add this mod.   
## How to Use
When an item frame is placed on the side of a container and the item frame contains items, right-clicking the items in the item frame can directly open the container behind it. Crouch and right-click the items in the item frame to rotate the items. Left-click functions as usual. When the item frame is empty, all of its logic behaves as it normally would.


## 中文
这是一个非常简单的mod
它的作用只有一个    
防止物品展示框挡住后面的容器（包括箱子，桶，熔炉等几乎所有的可交互方块）       
当然了，它也支持荧光物品展示框            
[Github仓库](https://github.com/Anchenqua/Through-Item-Frame)        
提示：它不需要服务器添加这个mod

## 用法
当物品展示框被放在容器的侧面并且里面有物品的时候，右键展示框是打开后面的容器而不是旋转物品，蹲下右键物品展示框里的物品可以旋转它，左键的逻辑不受影响，当物品展示框是空的时候，它的所有逻辑都和原本一致
